the birds behind the sounds spring spring has started and the birds are singing but which birds hear exactly and why they start singing the first place according bird expert joris buis the common chiff chaff one the first birds you can hear starting february and recognizable its song chiff chaff chiff chaff another one the great tit koolmees and his song sounds like tiny pump two high notes that rhythmically and down tee too tee too his yes the netherlands and europe mainly male birds who sing their goal attracting females scaring away other males fun fact singing important male songbirds that their brains mainly the part responsible for their vocals and even their balls significantly grow the latter can even become times its original size which birds have you spotted already the last few days springtime birds

you can vote for the city council all these apply you you are years older you are registered resident you are citizen you have been registered the netherlands without interruption for least years another way find out you eligible vote check whether you received voting pass your mail encourage you vote because you can let your voice heard regarding local policies for the next four years think about housing policies urban planning and design waste management and much more you can check which party represents your views for example filling the questionnaire kieskompas another trustworthy voting tool your municipality check your municipality website for more advice this cautious when using tools for voting advise because research shows that these can contain incorrect information regarding political parties and their standpoints the turnout local elections often low was around especially among young people let make difference use our right vote and let our voices heard coming march the polling stations which you can cast your vote will all around also possible vote our library the quarter library creaamsterdam rec and science park you can find all the stations via stembureaus

tomorrow the celebrates its dies natalis and are incredibly proud award honorary doctorate corinne vigreux founder tomtom corinne fundamentally transformed how navigate and helped millions worldwide find their way but her impact extends far beyond technology through the sofronie foundation she champions social mobility and founding codam innovative tuition free coding school with admission requirements she democratises access tech education this honorary doctorate recognises her pioneering role technology and her tireless commitment building more inclusive society christiaankanis

meet bas local buddy esnamsterdam and student communication science and applied psychology bas has been local buddy for years now him the buddy program about making friends sharing the city discovering cultures together and creating genuine connections made many great memories during student years that wish had from the start wanted help exchange and new international students make the same memories when they come became local buddy you also want become local buddy and help new international students feel home join the esn buddy program buddy you support new international and exchange students they settle into life whether you dutch international yourself who doesn speak dutch everyone who loves helping others welcome become local buddy the most important thing being open new cultures and ready make someone feel home buddy you make new friends learn from each other and create unforgettable memories how join download the esn papaya app from the app store google play store create account add your phone number and select the buddy program the menu need help check out the buddy program section our website
